title: aeschynanthus brachyphyllus
intro: Aeschynanthus brachyphyllus, also known as the Goldfish Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is native to Borneo and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus brachyphyllus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Aeschynanthus brachyphyllus can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, where the leaves are steeped in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
